quotes.quote: The growth curves are smoothed, after which biologically significant parameters are extracted and statistically analysed to determine whether the original hypotheses have been confirmed or refuted. Scientific knowledge gained from this process is used to update the model of yeast metabolism.
quotes.rationale: Statistical analysis of physically measured growth curves judges hypothesis confirmation and is routed into an update of the domain model, i.e. memory admission.

quotes.quote: This is a system which uses techniques from artificial intelligence to automate all aspects of the scientific discovery process: it generates hypotheses from a computer model of the domain, designs experiments to test these hypotheses, runs the physical experiments using robotic systems, analyses and interprets the resulting data, and repeats the cycle.
quotes.rationale: Establishes that the analysis step is an implemented in-loop component of a repeating cycle driven by the domain model.

quotes.quote: Adam conceived 20 hypotheses concerning the identity of genes encoding 13 locally orphan enzymes in S. cerevisiae. Adam tested all these hypotheses on its robotic system and was able to confirm by experimentation, with a high degree of confidence, the correctness of 12 of them [24].
quotes.rationale: Reported as an outcome assessment of hypothesis correctness on the robotic platform; no routing of this reported result into any further decision is stated, so it is coded terminal-only.

quotes.quote: Adam has already proven itself by discovering new knowledge [24], whilst Eve is still under development.
quotes.rationale: The confirmation outcome is presented by the authors themselves as evidence of the system's success, indicating self-evaluation rather than independent assessment.

quotes.quote: it generates hypotheses from a computer model of the domain, designs experiments to test these hypotheses, runs the physical experiments using robotic systems, analyses and interprets the resulting data, and repeats the cycle
quotes.rationale: The described pipeline lists hypothesis generation directly followed by experiment design; the packet contains no statement of any prior-art or novelty screen gating generated hypotheses, so this channel is coded not_reported rather than absent.

policy_type: cycle over model-derived hypothesis generation, experiment design, robotic execution, and analysis (R05-E01)
model update from statistically analysed results drives subsequent cycles (R05-E02)
memory_structure: computer model of the domain / model of yeast metabolism updated with confirmed knowledge (R05-E01, R05-E02)
comprehensive custom-made relational database (MySQL) storing all data and meta-data across stages (R05-E04)

diagnostics.statement: No reliability study (discrimination, agreement, bias, or calibration) is reported for the statistical confirmation channel that decides whether hypotheses are confirmed or refuted and updates the metabolism model.

exact_quotes.exact_quote: statistically analysed to determine whether the original hypotheses have been confirmed or refuted. Scientific knowledge gained from this process is used to update the model of yeast metabolism.

diagnostics.consequence: The error rate of the only in-loop validator is unknown, so incorrect confirmations could be admitted into the domain model and propagate into subsequent hypothesis generation cycles.

diagnostics.statement: Confirmation of the system's discoveries is reported by the authors themselves from a single robotic run; the packet reports no independent replication or external assessment, and 8 of 20 hypotheses were not confirmed.

exact_quotes.exact_quote: Adam tested all these hypotheses on its robotic system and was able to confirm by experimentation, with a high degree of confidence, the correctness of 12 of them [24].
Adam has already proven itself by discovering new knowledge [24], whilst Eve is still under development.

diagnostics.consequence: The headline validity claim rests on internal self-evaluation, leaving the correctness of the confirmed findings and the status of the unconfirmed hypotheses externally unverified.

diagnostics.statement: The stated confidence in confirmations ('a high degree of confidence') is not accompanied by any reported calibration of confidence against observed correctness frequencies.

exact_quotes.exact_quote: was able to confirm by experimentation, with a high degree of confidence, the correctness of 12 of them

diagnostics.consequence: Confidence statements cannot be interpreted quantitatively, so downstream users cannot weight admitted knowledge appropriately.

diagnostics.statement: Automation scope is stated as an intention with a narrow human role, but the boundary between automated and human-controlled steps for validation and policy is not fully specified.

exact_quotes.exact_quote: Adam is intended to be fully automated, with human intervention required only to supply library strain stocks and consumables.
we would not currently consider them to be 'cost-effective' in comparison to human scientists.

diagnostics.consequence: Closure of the validation loop and the locus of authority over policy and memory admission cannot be determined unambiguously from the packet.

exact_quotes.exact_quote: Adam tested all these hypotheses on its robotic system and was able to confirm by experimentation, with a high degree of confidence, the correctness of 12 of them [24].

success_check.observable: Confirmation status of each of the 20 hypotheses assessed by an evaluator organizationally independent of the system's developers.
success_check.comparator_or_threshold: Independent assessment agrees with the internal confirm/refute call on at least the 12 reported confirmations.
success_check.evidence_needed: Reported independent experimental or assay results with per-hypothesis outcomes and the independence relationship stated.

exact_quotes.exact_quote: The growth curves are smoothed, after which biologically significant parameters are extracted and statistically analysed to determine whether the original hypotheses have been confirmed or refuted.

success_check.observable: False-confirm and false-refute rates of the growth-curve statistical decision procedure on cases with known ground truth (e.g. control strains).
success_check.comparator_or_threshold: Error rates reported with intervals against a pre-stated acceptable threshold before results update the model.
success_check.evidence_needed: A reported systematic error/bias study of the confirmation procedure on positive and negative control experiments.

exact_quotes.exact_quote: Adam is intended to be fully automated, with human intervention required only to supply library strain stocks and consumables.

success_check.observable: An explicit statement of which cycle steps are machine-decided and which, if any, require human approval for validation, memory admission, and policy.
success_check.comparator_or_threshold: Every stage of the generate-design-execute-analyse-update cycle is assigned an explicit human-authority role.
success_check.evidence_needed: Documentation of the automation boundary per stage, distinguishing intended from exercised behaviour.
